name: Torex Gold Resources Inc.
description: Torex Gold Resources Inc. is a Canadian gold producer operating the 100%-owned Morelos Complex in the Guerrero Gold Belt, approximately 180 km southwest of Mexico City. The complex includes the ELG Underground and Media Luna Underground mines along with a fully integrated processing plant, making Torex Mexico's largest gold producer with 2026 guidance of 420,000–470,000 gold-equivalent ounces.
